title: dryopteris caduca
intro: Dryopteris caduca, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of deciduous fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris caduca include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
